assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he names regular pairing as currently missing support, implying both a clarity gap and insufficient growth support in how he learns to ship safely. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] pairing once or twice a week would probably prevent him getting stuck silently.

new_queue.label: Tooling friction
